items.headline: Seventh U.S. service member killed in Iran war ID'ed as Sgt. Benjamin Pennington
items.summary: Pennington, 26, from Glendale, Kentucky, was wounded on March 1 during an Iranian strike at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. He died on Sunday.

items.headline: Oil prices topped $100 per barrel on record supply disruption but are off session highs
items.summary: Gulf Arab oil producers are cutting production as they run out of storage space because they can't export through the Strait of Hormuz

items.headline: Prediction markets face questions on bets on the Iran war, from nuclear detonation to regime change

items.headline: The U.S.-Iran war is the biggest oil supply disruption in history
items.summary: The global oil market will need to balance by destroying demand through sharply rising oil prices, according to Rapidan Energy.

items.headline: Treasury yields tick higher as traders weigh inflation and recession risks with $100 oil

items.headline: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation reaches settlement with Department of Justice over antitrust concerns

items.headline: Hims & Hers shares surge after Novo Nordisk drops patent infringement case over compounded weight loss drugs
items.summary: Novo dropped its patent-infringement case against telehealth provider Hims & Hers after the companies agreed that Hims would sell Novo's branded medicines.

items.headline: The Iran war has put the brakes on the next Bank of England rate cut
items.summary: Before the war in Iran erupted, the Bank of England was widely predicted to be set to cut interest rates in March or April. Don't count on it, economists say.

items.headline: Oil shock prompts South Korea to impose fuel price cap for the first time in 30 years

items.headline: K-shaped economy puts pressure on women, as lower pay and higher costs reduce spending

items.headline: Amazon's Zoox expands robotaxi testing to Phoenix and Dallas
